items.title: 8-K — Acquisition or Disposition · Listing / Delisting / Compliance · Modifications to Holder Rights · Changes in Control · Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Amendments to Charter / Bylaws · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl completes OBDE merger, becomes second-largest BDC at $18.6B assets
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation (OBDC) closed its merger with Blue Owl Capital Corporation III (OBDE), becoming the second largest externally-managed publicly traded BDC with $18.6B i

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote · Regulation FD Disclosure · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital and Blue Owl Capital III shareholders approve their merger
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation and Blue Owl Capital Corporation III (OBDE) announced both obtained shareholder approval of their merger on January 8, 2025.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: ISS and Glass Lewis both recommend OBDC-OBDE shareholders vote for pending merger
items.snippet: Proxy advisory firms ISS and Glass Lewis both recommended shareholders vote "FOR" the pending merger between Blue Owl Capital Corporation and Blue Owl Capital Corporation III.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events
8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital III declares $0.52 special dividend ahead of OBDC merger closing
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation III declared a $0.52/share special dividend payable by January 31, 2025 to shareholders of record as of December 31, 2024, ahead of its pending merger

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Financial Statements and Exhibits

8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital III posts Q3 2024 NII of $0.41, beating $0.35 dividend
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation III reported Q3 2024 NII of $0.41/share, exceeding its $0.35/share regular dividend by 17%, with NAV at $15.49.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital III schedules Q3 2024 earnings for November 6, call November 7
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation III will release Q3 2024 results on November 6, 2024 after market close, with a webcast/call on November 7 at 11 a.m. ET.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital III posts Q2 2024 NII of $0.41, beating $0.35 dividend
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation III reported Q2 2024 NII of $0.41/share, exceeding its $0.35/share regular dividend by over 15%, with NAV at $15.56.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl and Blue Owl Capital III announce merger, forming $18.4B BDC
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation and Blue Owl Capital Corporation III announced a definitive merger agreement, creating a combined entity with $18.4B in total pro forma assets.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital III schedules Q2 2024 earnings for August 7, call August 8
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation III will release Q2 2024 results on August 7, 2024 after market close, with a webcast/call on August 8 at 11 a.m. ET.

items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital III releases early 19.5M shares from lock-up effective June 5
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation III's board agreed to waive transfer restrictions on 19,491,245 shares of common stock, effective June 5, 2024, as part of a partial early lock-up rele

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital III posts Q1 2024 NII of $0.39, beating regular dividend
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation III reported Q1 2024 NII of $0.39/share, exceeding the regular dividend by $0.04/share, with NAV at $15.65 after its NYSE listing in January.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital III schedules Q1 2024 earnings for May 8, call May 9
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation III will release Q1 2024 results on May 8, 2024 after market close, with a webcast/call on May 9 at 11 a.m. ET.

items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital III posts record Q4 2023 NII of $0.58, NAV at $15.56
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation III reported record Q4 2023 NII of $0.58/share, with a dividend of $0.49/share representing a 12.7% annualized yield, and NAV at $15.56.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital III begins NYSE trading January 25, posts preliminary Q4 NII $0.58
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation III received NYSE approval and began trading on January 25, 2024 under "OBDE", reporting preliminary Q4 2023 NII of approximately $0.58/share.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Capital III announces intent to list on NYSE on January 25, 2024
items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation III announced its intention to list shares on the New York Stock Exchange, anticipating trading to commence on January 25, 2024.

items.headline_ai: Owl Rock BDCs officially renamed Blue Owl, ticker changes to OBDC effective July 6
items.snippet: The Owl Rock BDCs were renamed effective July 6, 2023, with Owl Rock Capital Corporation trading as Blue Owl Capital Corporation under ticker OBDC on the NYSE.

items.headline_ai: Owl Rock BDCs to be renamed Blue Owl effective July 6, 2023
items.snippet: Owl Rock announced that its family of BDCs will be renamed to Blue Owl entities effective July 6, 2023, with no shareholder vote required.

items.headline_ai: Owl Rock hosts investor day to review direct lending platform and BDC strategy
items.snippet: Owl Rock, a division of Blue Owl Capital, hosted an investor day on May 24, 2023, featuring presentations from CEO Craig Packer and CFO on direct lending strategy.
